hero.name: Jumaqulov Yashnarbek
hero.description: I craft modern web experiences with clean code and creative design. Passionate about turning ideas into pixel-perfect realities.

about.title: About Me
about.subtitle: My Journey Through Time
about.bio: I'm Jumaqulov Yashnarbek, a junior frontend developer based in Uzbekistan. Every tick of the clock represents hours spent learning, building, and growing. I started my journey with HTML and CSS, fell in love with JavaScript, and now React is my home. I believe great UI is not just about looks — it's about how it feels.
